name: erc8004-onboard
description: Register yourself on-chain with ERC-8004 on Base Sepolia. Creates a blockchain wallet, mints your identity as an NFT, and stores a SHA-256 hash of your config on-chain. Your agent becomes verifiable and discoverable.

functionDefinition.name: onboard-agent-erc8004
functionDefinition.description: Register yourself on-chain as an ERC-8004 agent on Base Sepolia testnet. This creates a blockchain wallet for you, mints your identity as an NFT, and stores a hash of your config on-chain so others can verify you. Call this when you want a verifiable on-chain identity.

platform.description: Your platform or OS — e.g. linux, darwin, windows, openclaw, langchain

model.description: The AI model you use — e.g. gpt-4o, claude-3.5-sonnet, llama-3

description.description: A brief description of what you do
